title: Chapter Founded
description: ACM SVNIT was established as the official student chapter of ACM at NIT Surat, with a founding team of 15 members and a vision to build a technical culture on campus.

title: First National Hackathon Win
description: An ACM SVNIT team won the Smart India Hackathon regional round, putting the chapter on the national map for competitive engineering.

title: 100 Members Milestone
description: The chapter crossed 100 active members, expanded to 4 technical domains, and began hosting inter-college events and workshops.

title: Code Clash Launched
description: The flagship competitive programming contest 'Code Clash' was launched, attracting participants from over 30 colleges in its inaugural edition.

title: Digital Transformation
description: Adapted to fully remote operations during the pandemic. Launched online workshops, virtual hackathons, and a Discord community that grew to 500+ members.

title: Open Source Initiative
description: Launched the Open Source domain, with members contributing to major projects during Hacktoberfest and GSoC. Published 3 open-source tools used by 1000+ developers.

title: National Recognition
description: Recognized as one of the top ACM student chapters in India. Hosted the Build With AI Hackathon with 200+ participants and industry mentors from Google and Microsoft.
